name: First Gen Forward Scholarship

eligibility.other_requirements: Must be a first-generation college student (neither parent holds a bachelor's degree); specific criteria vary by sponsoring organization or institution

stackable_notes: Generally stackable with institutional aid; as an external scholarship it may trigger institutional displacement at some schools — advisors should check school policy on outside awards for first-gen students.
notes: This category refers to a range of scholarships specifically designated for first-generation college students across many different sponsoring organizations. Amounts and eligibility vary significantly by sponsor. Advisors should research institution-specific first-gen scholarships at target colleges, as many schools run robust internal first-gen programs with more funding than stand-alone external awards.
